privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: This Privacy Policy describes how JigSwap ('we', 'our', or 'us') collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our jigsaw puzzle trading platform.

informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.description: We collect information you provide directly to us and information we collect automatically when you use our service.

automaticallyCollected.title: Automatically Collected Information
items: Device information (IP address, browser type, operating system)
Usage data (pages visited, features used, time spent)

howWeUseInformation.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUseInformation.description: We use the information we collect to provide, improve, and secure our services.
purposes: Provide and maintain our puzzle trading platform
Process trades and facilitate exchanges between users
Personalize your experience and show relevant content
Send important service updates and notifications
Analyze usage patterns to improve our service
Prevent fraud and ensure platform security
Respond to your questions and support requests

dataStorage.title: Data Storage and Hosting
dataStorage.description: Your data is securely stored and managed by trusted third-party services:

convex.title: Convex
convex.description: Our primary database and backend services are hosted by Convex. They handle data storage, user authentication, and real-time features.

vercel.title: Vercel
vercel.description: Our web application is hosted on Vercel's infrastructure, which provides fast, reliable, and secure hosting services.

analytics.title: Analytics and Tracking
analytics.description: We use analytics to understand how our service is used and improve user experience.

posthog.title: PostHog Analytics
posthog.description: We use PostHog to collect anonymous usage analytics. This helps us understand user behavior and improve our platform. PostHog data is used solely for service improvement and is not sold to third parties.

analytics.noAdvertising: We do not use your data for advertising purposes. Your information will never be sold to advertisers or third parties for marketing purposes.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing and Third Parties
dataSharing.description: We are committed to protecting your privacy and do not sell your personal information.
dataSharing.noSale: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for advertising or marketing purposes.
dataSharing.limitedSharing: We may share your information only in these limited circumstances:
circumstances: To protect our rights and prevent fraud
With service providers who assist in platform operations (under strict confidentiality agreements)

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information:
measures: Encryption of data in transit and at rest

yourRights.title: Your Rights and Choices
yourRights.description: You have control over your personal information:
rights: Access and review your personal data
Delete your account and associated data
Opt out of certain data collection
Export your data in a portable format

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience:
types: Analytics cookies to understand usage patterns
Preference cookies to remember your settings
cookies.control: You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website. For more information on how we use cookies, please see our cookie policy.
cookieConsent.acceptanceText: By clicking "Accept", you agree to our use of cookies.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.description: Our service is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

international.title: International Data Transfers
international.description: Your data may be processed in countries other than your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your information.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on our website and updating the 'Last Updated' date.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
contact.questions: We're committed to transparency and will respond to your privacy inquiries promptly.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: These Terms of Service ('Terms') govern your use of JigSwap, our jigsaw puzzle trading platform. By using our service, you agree to these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.description: By accessing or using JigSwap, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of these terms, you may not access our service.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.description: JigSwap is a platform that enables users to trade, exchange, and manage jigsaw puzzles. Our service includes:

userAccounts.title: User Accounts
userAccounts.description: To use certain features of our service, you must create an account. You are responsible for:
responsibilities: Maintaining the security of your account
Notifying us of any unauthorized use
Being at least 13 years old to use the service

userConduct.title: User Conduct
userConduct.description: You agree to use our service responsibly and in accordance with these terms:
prohibited: Violating any applicable laws or regulations
Attempting to gain unauthorized access to our systems
Using the service for commercial purposes without permission

trading.title: Trading and Exchanges
trading.description: Our platform facilitates puzzle trading between users. By participating in trades, you agree to:
agreements: Accurately describe puzzle condition and completeness
trading.disclaimer: JigSwap acts as a facilitator for trades but is not responsible for the quality, condition, or completeness of traded puzzles. Users trade at their own risk.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.description: Our service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by JigSwap and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Your privacy is important to us. Please review our Privacy Policy, which also governs your use of the service.

termination.title: Account Termination
termination.description: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice, for any reason, including breach of these Terms.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.description: The service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted or error-free.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.description: JigSwap shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of the service.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify users of any material changes by posting the new terms on our website.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
contact.questions: We're committed to transparency and will respond to your inquiries promptly.

about.title: About JigSwap
about.subtitle: The complete platform for jigsaw puzzle enthusiasts
about.introduction: JigSwap is more than just a puzzle trading platform. We're building a community where puzzle enthusiasts can connect, share, and grow their passion for jigsaw puzzles in a sustainable way.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe that puzzles should have multiple lives. Our mission is to create a sustainable ecosystem where puzzle enthusiasts can share their completed puzzles with others, discover new challenges, and build meaningful connections within the community.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We envision a world where every puzzle enthusiast has access to an endless variety of puzzles without the environmental impact of constant new purchases. A world where the joy of puzzling is shared and celebrated across borders and cultures.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We're committed to reducing waste in the puzzle industry by promoting reuse and sharing of completed puzzles.

community.title: Community
community.description: We believe in the power of community and fostering connections between puzzle enthusiasts worldwide.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We operate with complete transparency in our data practices and platform operations.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: We strive to make puzzle trading accessible to everyone, regardless of location or economic background.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: JigSwap was born from a simple family need: we wanted to easily see what puzzles our friends and family owned so we could exchange them. Completed puzzles often sit on shelves, taking up space while others search for new challenges. We saw an opportunity to create a platform that not only solves this problem but also builds a community around the shared love of puzzling.
story.founded: Founded in 2025 as a family side project, JigSwap has grown from a simple idea to a thriving community of puzzle enthusiasts. Our platform combines modern technology with the timeless joy of jigsaw puzzles, creating an experience that's both nostalgic and innovative.

team.title: The Team
team.description: JigSwap is built by a family of puzzle enthusiasts, for puzzle enthusiasts. We started this as a side project to solve our own need for sharing puzzles with friends and family.
team.passion: We're passionate about creating a platform that serves the puzzle community while promoting sustainable practices in the hobby we all love.

technology.title: Technology
technology.description: Built with modern web technologies, JigSwap provides a seamless experience for managing collections, tracking completions, and facilitating trades.

community.title: Join Our Community
community.description: Whether you're a casual puzzler or a dedicated enthusiast, JigSwap has something for you. Join thousands of users who are already trading, connecting, and growing their puzzle collections.
community.getStarted: Ready to start your puzzle journey? Create an account and begin exploring the world of sustainable puzzle trading.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
contact.introduction: Have questions, suggestions, or just want to say hello? We're here to help and would love to hear from you. Our team is committed to providing excellent support to the JigSwap community.

waysToContact.title: Ways to Contact Us
waysToContact.description: Choose the method that works best for you. We typically respond within 24 hours during business days.

email.title: Email Support
email.description: For general inquiries, support questions, or feedback:

support.title: Technical Support
support.description: For technical issues, bug reports, or feature requests:
support.responseTime: We aim to respond within 12 hours for urgent issues

privacy.title: Privacy & Legal
privacy.description: For privacy concerns or legal matters:
privacy.responseTime: We respond to all privacy inquiries within 48 hours

business.title: Business Inquiries
business.description: For partnerships, collaborations, or business opportunities:
business.responseTime: We'll get back to you within 2-3 business days

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Before reaching out, you might find answers to common questions in our FAQ section.
topics: How to get started with JigSwap

feedback.title: Feedback & Suggestions
feedback.description: We're always looking to improve JigSwap. Your feedback helps us make the platform better for everyone.

response.title: What to Expect
response.description: When you contact us, here's what you can expect:
expectations: Acknowledgment of your message within 24 hours
Follow-up if additional information is needed
Escalation to appropriate team members when necessary

callToAction.title: Ready to Transform Your Puzzle Experience?
callToAction.description: Join thousands of puzzle enthusiasts who are already managing their collections, trading puzzles, and connecting with the community on JigSwap

notifications.pushServiceUnreachable: Your browser couldn't reach its push service. Some privacy browsers block or remove it — Brave disables it by default (enable 'Use Google services for push messaging' in Settings), and de-Googled Chromium builds like Helium strip it out. Firefox, Chrome, or Edge will work.

footer.tagline: Swap, lend and share jigsaw puzzles — accessible and sustainable, for the whole community.
footer.madeBy: Made with 🧩 by a family of puzzlers.

home.heroTitle: Share jigsaw puzzles with fellow enthusiasts
home.heroLead: Build your own puzzle library, lend or swap puzzles, and always see who has your lent-out boxes. Connect with puzzlers across the country.

how.title: Up and running in three steps
how.lead: No fuss, no cost to begin. That's how simple shared puzzling is.
how.step1Body: Add your puzzles with brand, piece count and condition — ready in a few taps.
how.step2Body: Browse the community, filter by difficulty and piece count, and request a puzzle to borrow or swap.
how.step3Body: Lend out for a while or indefinitely, and always see who has your puzzle.

rows.libraryTitle: A shelf that feels like home
rows.libraryBody: Your collection as real 3D boxes on a wooden plank. Track completions, condition and notes — as tactile as your real bookshelf.
rows.lendTitle: Lend out — and always know who has your puzzles
rows.lendBody: Someone wants your puzzle? Lend it out for a while or indefinitely. JigSwap keeps track of who has which box — so lending is as carefree as puzzling.
rows.lendPoint1: Lend for a while or forever
rows.lendPoint3: Ask for it back whenever you like
rows.discoverBody: Filter by piece count, difficulty, condition and category. Discover what fellow puzzlers have on their shelves and request a swap or a loan.
rows.discoverPoint3: Lend, swap or share in your circle

sustain.title: One puzzle, many hands
sustain.body: A finished puzzle doesn't need to gather dust in the attic. By sharing, lending and swapping, the community gives puzzles a second, third and fourth life — and everyone gets more joy from them.

quote.text: “We built JigSwap because our finished puzzles deserved better than the attic — and because puzzling is more fun when you share it.”
quote.name: The family behind JigSwap
quote.sub: Puzzling at the kitchen table since 2025

cta.title: Ready to share your first puzzle?
cta.body: It's free to begin. Build your shelf and meet the community.

how.heroTitle: From shelf to sharing, in five steps
how.heroLead: JigSwap makes sharing puzzles as relaxing as puzzling itself. Here's how it works, end to end.
how.step1Body: Sign up for free, pick a username and tell the community a little about yourself and the puzzles you love.
how.step2Body: Add your puzzles with brand, piece count, difficulty and condition — and an EAN if you have it handy.
how.step3Body: Browse the community, filter for what you want and request a puzzle to borrow or swap. See instantly who offers something you'd like to try.
how.step4Body: Propose a loan or a swap, agree the details together, and pick a spot to hand the puzzle over in person. Everything stays tidy in one place.
how.step5Body: Always see who has your puzzle. Ask for it back whenever you like, log your completion and leave an honest review.
how.modesTitle: Lend, swap or share in circles
how.modesLead: You decide how to share a puzzle. Every way is equally welcome.
how.mode1Body: Someone wants your puzzle? Lend it out for as long as you like — even forever. JigSwap tracks who has it, and you ask for it back whenever suits you.
how.mode2Body: Trade one finished puzzle for another. Two puzzlers, two new challenges.
how.mode3Body: Create a private circle for family or friends and share your shelf with exactly the people you choose — with per-circle permissions.
how.faq1A: Creating an account, filling your shelf, lending and swapping is free. You hand puzzles over in person, so there are no shipping costs.
how.faq2Q: Can I borrow a puzzle indefinitely?
how.faq2A: Yes. Agree with the owner how long you keep it — that can be indefinitely. The owner always sees who has the puzzle and can ask for it back.
how.faq3Q: How does the owner keep track of their puzzle?
how.faq3A: Every puzzle appears in your 'My puzzles' overview with its status and who has it: available, lent out or recalled. A recall automatically sends the borrower a notification.
how.faq4Q: How do I hand the puzzle over?
how.faq4A: In person. You agree a place and time to hand the puzzle over — easy and free of shipping costs. For now we don't arrange shipping.

features.heroLead: From a personal puzzle library to lending-with-tracking and a community you trust — here's what JigSwap gives you.
features.g1i1Body: Every puzzle with brand, piece count, condition and notes — one tidy, tactile overview.
features.g1i2Body: Group by brand, theme or mood — private or public, with your own name, colour and icon.
features.g1i3Body: Track dates, solve times and ratings — and set goals for your puzzle year.
features.g2Title: Always know who has your puzzles
features.g2i1Body: Everything you've lent out in one place — who has it and since when.
features.g2i2Body: Available, lent out or recalled — see where every box stands at a glance.
features.g2i3Title: For as long as you like
features.g2i3Body: Lend out for a while or forever, and ask for it back whenever suits you.
features.g3i1Body: Filter by piece count, difficulty, condition and category.
features.g3i2Body: See the newest puzzles in the catalog as the community adds them.
features.g3i3Body: Propose, accept and complete swaps — with clear statuses every step of the way.
features.g4i1Body: Share your shelf with family and friend groups — you decide who may see and exchange.
features.g4i2Body: Rate exchanges afterwards — honest reviews and trust levels keep swapping pleasant.
features.g4i3Body: Follow fellow puzzlers, see their activity and share your public profile.

aboutPage.heroLead: JigSwap grew out of a family side project: we just wanted an easy way to see and swap puzzles with friends and family. From there, a platform for the whole puzzle community was born.
aboutPage.missionTitle: Making puzzle sharing accessible and sustainable — for everyone
aboutPage.missionBody: We believe a finished puzzle isn't the end, but a new beginning for someone else. JigSwap connects puzzlers so every box gets opened more often.
aboutPage.value1Body: Puzzling is relaxation. We're about sharing and joy, not profit.
aboutPage.value2Body: One puzzle you lend out and that passes through many hands is worth more than ten gathering dust.
aboutPage.value3Body: We build for the people who love puzzling as much as we do.
aboutPage.value4Body: Honest reviews and transparent tracking keep every exchange safe.
aboutPage.tl1Body: Started as a simple way to swap puzzles with friends and family.
aboutPage.tl2Body: The tactile puzzle plank was born — a digital shelf that feels like home.
aboutPage.tl3Body: Puzzlers now share, lend and swap across the country.

contactPage.heroTitle: Got a question or something to share?
contactPage.heroLead: We'd love to hear from you — whether you need help, have an idea, or just want to say hi.
contactPage.emailSub: We usually reply within 1 business day.
contactPage.supportSub: Questions about a swap or your account.
contactPage.privacySub: For privacy concerns or legal matters.
contactPage.basedBody: JigSwap is an online platform — we work from home, in between puzzles.
contactPage.errorMessage: Tell us a bit more (min. 10 chars)
contactPage.errorSubmit: Something went wrong while sending — please try again.
contactPage.privacyNote: By sending, you agree to our privacy policy.
contactPage.sentBody: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as we can.

legal.privacyLead: Your trust is everything. Here's how we handle your data carefully and transparently.
legal.termsLead: The ground rules that keep swapping fair and pleasant for everyone.
